name: Doc says MMI, what next for back claim in Centerville?

mainEntity.name: Doc says MMI, what next for back claim in Centerville?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Get impairment rating for permanent partial disability benefits.**[3]

Maximum Medical Improvement ends temp benefits; rating % determines lump sum or ongoing pay.

- AMA Guides used.
- 10-20% common for backs.
- Negotiate settlement.

Attorney maximizes rating value.
